info.name: NexoraKit API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for NexoraKit — enterprise chatbot platform.

**Authentication:**
- Operator routes require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (API key or HS256 JWT)
- Admin routes additionally require `role: admin` in the JWT `role` claim
- Client (end-user) routes use `X-End-User-Id` header (anonymous mode) or their own `Authorization` header

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}` — defaults to `http://localhost:3000`

**Variables:**
| Name | Description |
|---|---|
| `baseUrl` | Gateway base URL (e.g. `http://localhost:3000`) |
| `apiPrefix` | API prefix, default `/v1` |
| `token` | Operator bearer token (API key or JWT) |
| `conversationId` | ID of a conversation |
| `agentSlug` | Public slug of an agent |
| `botId` | Bot ID |
| `agentId` | Agent ID |

variable.description: Operator bearer token (API key or HS256 JWT)
End-user external ID (used in X-End-User-Id header for anonymous mode)

request.description:
Returns gateway health status. Public endpoint — no auth required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "plugins": { "total": 3, "enabled": 2, "errored": 0 },
  "uptime": 12345
}
```
Returns the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this gateway. Public endpoint.

Returns in-memory metrics snapshot (request counts, latency histograms, etc.).

Requires bearer auth unless the gateway is started with `publicMetrics: true`.

item.name: Conversations
item.description: Core conversation management. All routes require operator bearer token.

request.description:
Creates a new conversation. Returns `201` with the created `ConversationRecord`.

All fields are optional. `templateId` and `workspaceId` link to pre-existing resources.

Lists conversations for the authenticated operator user. Supports cursor-based pagination.

**Response:**
```json
{ "items": [...], "nextCursor": "<string|null>" }
```
Retrieves a single conversation by ID.
Updates the conversation title and/or metadata.
Soft-deletes a conversation. Returns `204 No Content`.

item.name: Messages
item.description: Sending, editing, and regenerating messages within a conversation.

request.description:
Sends a message and runs the agent loop. Returns the full response including events.

`input` can be:
- A plain string
- `{ type: 'text', text: '...' }`
- `{ type: 'action', actionId: '...', payload: {...} }`
- `{ type: 'file', fileId: '...', text?: '...' }`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "conversationId": "...",
  "message": { ... },
  "events": [ ... ]
}
```
Edits a user message by sequence number and re-runs the agent loop from that point. Requires `conversationStore` + `messageStore`.
Regenerates an assistant message at the given sequence number. Requires `conversationStore` + `messageStore`.

Submits thumbs-up/down feedback for a specific message. Requires `feedbackStore`.

`rating`: `"positive"` or `"negative"`
`tags`: max 10 items, each max 50 chars.

**Deprecated.** Legacy single-endpoint chat. Use `POST /conversations/:id/messages` instead.

If `conversationId` is omitted, a new conversation is created automatically.

item.name: Plugins
item.description: Plugin discovery endpoints (read-only, any authenticated operator).

request.description: Returns detailed information about a specific plugin including its tools and permissions.

item.name: Files
item.description: File upload and management. Requires `fileStore` + `fileBackend` to be configured. File content is base64-encoded.

request.description:
Uploads a file. File content must be base64-encoded. Default max size is 10 MB.

Returns `201` with the file metadata record.
Returns file metadata (does not include content).

Downloads file content as base64.

**Response:**
```json
{ "id": "...", "filename": "...", "mimeType": "...", "content": "<base64>" }
```
Deletes a file. Returns `204 No Content`.

Lists all files associated with a conversation.

**Response:** `{ "files": [...] }`

Lists all artifacts produced during a conversation.

**Response:** `{ "artifacts": [...] }`
Returns a specific artifact.
Lists all versions of a specific artifact.
Returns a specific version of an artifact. Replace `1` with the desired version number.
Deletes an artifact and all its versions. Returns `204 No Content`.

Lists memory facts stored for the currently authenticated user.

**Response:** `{ "facts": [...] }`
Deletes a specific memory fact by key. Returns `204 No Content`.
Deletes **all** memory facts for the current user. The `?confirm=true` query parameter is required. Returns `204 No Content`.

item.name: Workspaces
item.description: Workspace and context document management. Requires `workspaceStore` + `contextDocumentStore`. Write operations require admin role.

request.description:
Lists all workspaces. Any authenticated operator user.

**Response:** `{ "workspaces": [...] }`
Returns a specific workspace.
Creates a new workspace. Requires `admin` role. Returns `201`.
Updates a workspace. Requires `admin` role. Pass `null` to clear nullable fields.
Deletes a workspace and cascades to its context documents. Requires `admin` role. Returns `204`.
Lists context documents in a workspace. Any authenticated operator user.
Adds a context document to a workspace. Requires `admin` role. `content` max 100,000 chars. Returns `201`.
Updates a context document. Requires `admin` role.
Deletes a context document. Requires `admin` role. Returns `204`.

item.name: Templates
item.description: Conversation template management. Requires `templateStore`. Write operations require admin role.

request.description: Lists available conversation templates. Any authenticated operator user.
Returns a specific template.
Creates a conversation template. Requires `admin` role. Returns `201`.
Updates a template. Requires `admin` role. Pass `null` to clear nullable fields.
Deletes a template. Requires `admin` role. Returns `204`.

item.name: Admin — Plugins
item.description: Plugin lifecycle management. All routes require `admin` role + `config.admin` to be provided.

request.description:
Enables a plugin by namespace.

**Response:** `{ "status": "enabled", "namespace": "..." }`

Disables a plugin by namespace.

**Response:** `{ "status": "disabled", "namespace": "..." }`

Uninstalls a plugin permanently.

**Response:** `{ "status": "uninstalled", "namespace": "..." }`

item.name: Admin — Audit Log
item.description: Audit log query and purge. All routes require `admin` role.

request.description:
Queries audit log entries with optional filters.

**Response:**
```json
{ "events": [...], "count": 42 }
```

Purges all audit log entries. Irreversible.

**Response:** `{ "deleted": 123 }`

Returns usage analytics broken down by plugin.

**Response:**
```json
{ "breakdown": "plugin", "data": [...], "totalTokens": 12345 }
```

Returns usage analytics broken down by day.

**Response:** `{ "breakdown": "daily", "data": [...] }`

item.name: Admin — Feedback
item.description: Admin feedback query and summary. Requires `admin` role + `feedbackStore`.

request.description: Queries message feedback records with filtering and cursor-based pagination.
Returns an aggregated feedback summary (totals, ratings breakdown, etc.).

item.name: Admin — Bots
item.description: Bot configuration CRUD. All routes require `admin` role + bot/agent stores.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Support Bot",
  "description": "Handles customer support queries",
  "systemPrompt": "You are a friendly customer support agent. Always be polite and helpful.",
  "pluginNamespaces": [],
  "model": "gpt-4o",
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "maxTurns": 15,
  "workspaceId": null,
  "metadata": {}
}

request.description:
Creates a bot configuration. Returns `201` with the bot record.

`systemPrompt` and `model` are required. `temperature` range: 0–2. `maxTurns` range: 1–100.
Lists all bots. **Response:** `{ "bots": [...] }`
Returns a specific bot by ID.
Partially updates a bot. Pass `null` to clear nullable fields (`temperature`, `maxTurns`, `workspaceId`).
Deletes a bot. Returns `204 No Content`.

item.name: Admin — Agents
item.description: Agent CRUD, bot bindings, and end-user management. All routes require `admin` role.

request.description:
Creates a new agent. `slug` and `name` are required.

`slug` format: lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, 1–60 chars, e.g. `support-agent`.

`orchestrationStrategy`: `single` | `orchestrate` | `route`
`endUserAuth.mode`: `anonymous` | `token` | `jwt`

Returns `201` with the agent record.
Lists all agents. **Response:** `{ "agents": [...] }`

Returns an agent with its current bot bindings.

**Response:** `{ ...agent, bindings: [...] }`
Partially updates an agent. Pass `null` to clear nullable fields (`orchestratorModel`, `orchestratorPrompt`, `botId`, `fallbackBotId`).
Deletes an agent and all its bindings. Returns `204 No Content`.

Replaces **all** bot-to-agent bindings atomically. Send an empty `bindings` array to remove all bindings.

`priority`: 0 = highest priority. Used for routing strategy.

**Response:** `{ "bindings": [...] }`

Lists all end users who have interacted with a specific agent.

**Response:** `{ "users": [...] }`

item.name: Client API (End-User Facing)
item.description:
Public client-facing routes accessed via the agent's public slug. These bypass operator auth and use end-user authentication instead.

**End-User Auth modes (configured per agent):**
- `anonymous`: Send `X-End-User-Id: <your-external-user-id>` header
- `token`: Send `Authorization: Bearer nk_<externalUserId>`
- `jwt`: Send `Authorization: Bearer <HS256 JWT with sub claim>`

request.description:
Returns public appearance and feature flags for an agent. Fully public — no auth required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "slug": "support-agent",
  "name": "Support Agent",
  "description": "...",
  "appearance": { "displayName": "...", "welcomeMessage": "...", ... },
  "features": { "artifacts": false, "fileUpload": false, "feedback": true, "memory": false }
}
```

Creates a conversation as an end user. Auth is handled by the agent's `endUserAuth` configuration.

For `anonymous` mode, set the `X-End-User-Id` header to a stable user ID from your system.
For `token` mode, set `Authorization: Bearer nk_<userId>`.
For `jwt` mode, set `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`.

Returns `201` with conversation record.
Lists conversations belonging to the authenticated end user.
Returns a specific conversation. Access is scoped to the authenticated end user.

Sends a message as an end user and runs the agent loop. Rate-limited per agent config (`messagesPerMinute`).

**Response:**
```json
{
  "conversationId": "...",
  "message": { ... },
  "events": [ ... ]
}
```
